zh.lifeSummary: 當Margaret Carnes於1764年出生在愛爾蘭時，她的父親William Carnes15歲，母親Mrs. William Carnes25歲。她於1791年與John Borland II在美國賓夕法尼亞州威斯特摩蘭潘 堂史普結婚。他們至少是7個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她於1850年住在美國賓夕法尼亞州威斯特摩蘭戴利 堂史普洛亞爾韓納。她去世於1866年在美國賓夕法尼亞州享年102歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Margaret Carnes于1764年出生在爱尔兰时，她的父亲William Carnes15岁，母亲Mrs. William Carnes25岁。她于1791年与John Borland II在美国宾夕法尼亚州威斯特摩蘭潘 堂史普结婚。他们至少是7个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她于1850年住在美国宾夕法尼亚州威斯特摩蘭戴利 堂史普洛亞爾韓納。她去世于1866年在美国宾夕法尼亚州享年102岁。

nameMeanings.name: Carnes
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English and Scottish: variant of Cairns or sometimes Carins, a variant of Caron , with excrescent -s.
English and Cornish: in southern England a variant of Carn , with excrescent -s.

variants.name: Cairns
meanings: Scottish (southern): habitational name from the lands of Cairns in Mid Calder (Midlothian).
Irish (Down, Antrim, and Tyrone): in the north of Ireland, there may have been confusion between the Scottish surname and Irish Ó Ciaráin, Anglicized as Kieran and Kearns .

nameMeanings.name: Margaret
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

variants.name: Margareta
meanings: From the Latin form of Greek Margarītēs. See Margaret .

historicEvents.description: Historical Boundaries: 1773: Westmoreland, Pennsylvania Colony, British Colonial America 1776: Westmoreland, Pennsylvania, United States
Thomas Jefferson's American Declaration of Independence endorsed by Congress. Colonies declare independence.
Bill of Rights guarantees individual freedom.

historicEvents.title: Panic! of 1819
historicEvents.description: With the Aftermath of the Napoleonic Wars the global market for trade was down. During this time, America had its first financial crisis and it lasted for only two years.
The Night of the BIG WIND. In Killarney and its neighborhood there was a terrible hurricane. The town sustained much damage and many houses were shattered.
The Irish Potato Famine. Many Irish emigrate to America. Irish population drops from 8 million to 6 million due to death from starvation or emigration.
U.S. acquires vast tracts of Mexican territory in wake of Mexican War including California and New Mexico.

en.lifeSummary: When Margaret Carnes was born in 1764, in Ireland, her father, William Carnes, was 15 and her mother, Mrs. William Carnes, was 25. She married John Borland II in 1791, in Penn Township, Westmoreland, Pennsylvania, United States. They were the parents of at least 7 sons and 2 daughters. She lived in Loyalhanna, Derry Township, Westmoreland, Pennsylvania, United States in 1850. She died in 1866, in Pennsylvania, United States, at the age of 102.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Margaret Carnes est née en 1764, à Irlande, son père, William Carnes, avait 15 ans et sa mère, Mrs. William Carnes, avait 25 ans. Elle a épousé John Borland II en 1791, à Penn Township, Westmoreland, Pennsylvanie, États-Unis. Ils ont eu au moins 7 fils et 2 filles. Elle a vécu à Loyalhanna, Derry Township, Westmoreland, Pennsylvanie, États-Unis en 1850. Elle est décédée en 1866, à Pennsylvanie, États-Unis, à l’âge de 102 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Margaret Carnes 1764 in Irland geboren wurde, war ihr Vater William Carnes 15 und ihre Mutter Mrs. William Carnes 25. Sie hat 1791 in Penn Township, Westmoreland, Pennsylvania, Vereinigte Staaten John Borland II geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 7 Söhne und 2 Töchter. 1850 hat sie in Loyalhanna, Derry Township, Westmoreland, Pennsylvania, Vereinigte Staaten gelebt. Sie starb 1866 im Alter von 102 Jahren in Pennsylvania, Vereinigte Staaten.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Margaret Carnes è nata il nel 1764 nel Irlanda, sua padre, William Carnes, aveva 15 anni e sua madre, Mrs. William Carnes, aveva 25 anni. Lei sposato John Borland II nel 1791, nel Penn Township, Westmoreland, Pennsylvania, Stati Uniti d'America. Erano genitori di almeno 7 figli e 2 figlie. Vissuto a Loyalhanna, Derry Township, Westmoreland, Pennsylvania, Stati Uniti d'America nel 1850. Morì nel 1866, nel Pennsylvania, Stati Uniti d'America, all'età di 102 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Margaret Carnesが1764年にアイルランドで生まれた時，父William Carnesは15歳，母Mrs. William Carnesは25歳であった。1791年にアメリカ合衆国ペンシルベニア州ウエストモーエランドペン トウンシュイップでJohn Borland IIと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも7人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1850年にはアメリカ合衆国ペンシルベニア州ウエストモーエランドデリー トウンシュイップロイアルハナに住んでいた。彼女は1866年にアメリカ合衆国ペンシルベニア州で102歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Margaret Carnes(이)가 1764년 아일랜드에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 William Carnes(은)는 15세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Mrs. William Carnes(은)는 25세였다. 그녀는 1791년 미국 펜실베이니아 주 웨스트모렐랜드 펜 타운시프에서 John Borland II(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 일곱 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 1850년도에 미국 펜실베이니아 주 웨스트모렐랜드 더리 타운시프 로야해나에서 살았다. 그녀는 1866년 미국 펜실베이니아 주에서 102세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Margaret Carnes nasceu em 1764, em Irlanda, seu pai, William Carnes, tinha 15 anos e sua mãe, Mrs. William Carnes, tinha 25 anos. Ela casou-se com John Borland II em 1791, em Penn Township, Westmoreland, Pensilvânia, Estados Unidos da América. Eles tiveram pelo menos 7 filhos e 2 filhas. Ela viveu em Loyalhanna, Derry Township, Westmoreland, Pensilvânia, Estados Unidos da América em 1850. Ela faleceu em 1866, em Pensilvânia, Estados Unidos da América, com 102 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Margaret Carnes родилась в 1764 г. в местности Ирландия, её отцу по имени William Carnes было 15 лет, а матери, которую звали Mrs. William Carnes, 25. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени John Borland II в 1791 г. в местности пенн тоуншип, вестмореланд, Пенсильвания, Соединенные штаты. У них было по крайней мере 7 сыновей и 2 дочери. Она жила в местности лоялханна, дирри тоуншип, вестмореланд, Пенсильвания, Соединенные штаты в 1850 году. Она умерла в 1866 г. в местности Пенсильвания, Соединенные штаты в возрасте 102 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Margaret Carnes nació en 1764, en Irlanda, su papá, William Carnes, tenía 15 años y su mamá, Mrs. William Carnes, tenía 25 años. Se casó con John Borland II en 1791, en Penn Township, Westmoreland, Pensilvania, Estados Unidos. Fueron padres de por lo menos 7 hijos y 2 hijas. Vivió en Loyalhanna, Derry Township, Westmoreland, Pensilvania, Estados Unidos en 1850. Murió en 1866, en Pensilvania, Estados Unidos, a la edad de 102 años.
